creator: tmk@adionline.com
text:
When installing the system, the loader panics and has to reboot, I cannot install the OS. With ACPI enabled Fatal Trap 12 Page Fault While in Kernel Module, without ACPI fatal trap 9 | PCI0 (no driver attached)

This is on a Dell Dimension E520 Dual Core

How-To-Repeat: Run The Installation
